title: Ubiquiti UA-G3-SK-Pro, UniFi G3 Starter Kit Proffesional
category: Ubiquiti UA-G3-SK-Pro, UniFi G3 Starter Kit Proffesional
description: UniFi Access G3 Starter Kit professional is a professional basic set of components to install the UniFi Access access system . The set is compatible with most electric locks, magnetic locks and a whole range of 12V accessories such as motion sensors, buttons and alarms. The installation of the entire ecosystem is very fast, easy and offers simple management of users , visitors, plans and levels or access permissions via UniFi Access Controller. The set is powered via PoE, which is not included… Sample connection diagram with G3 professional starter kit UniFi Access controller management - management of users / roles / permissions / statistics (1) UniFi Access Door Hub (hub / controller) (1) UniFi Access Reader G3 Professional (reader + display) (1) UniFi Access Reader G3 (reader) (2) UniFi Access Pocket Keyfob (access key)
